archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
design_philosophy: Apple Store-inspired premium retail layout. Focus on generous negative space, brushed metal or matte glass equivalents via CSS (glassmorphism), high contrast typography, and frictionless conversion paths via WhatsApp. Every element breathes; avoiding clutter.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Sections should use py-24 or py-32. Containers max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-8.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Padding p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Border radius 12px (rounded-xl).
spacing_and_layout.buttons: Border radius 8px (rounded-lg). Height 48px or 56px for main CTAs.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: soft layered shadows (shadow-sm to shadow-lg, no hard offsets).
spacing_and_layout.grid: Use bento grid principles for categories. Asymmetrical spans to create tension.

surface_strategies.nav: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border border-border/40. z-50 sticky top.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid #ffffff background, border border-border, shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300.
surface_strategies.buttons: Accent buttons MUST be bg-[#22c55e] hover:bg-[#16a34a] text-white.

animations.hero: Ken Burns effect on the background image (scale from 1 to 1.05 over 10 seconds).
animations.showroom: Scroll-triggered parallax for the split section image.
animations.features: Horizontal scroll container for 'Why Choose Us'.
animations.interactions: All interactive elements must have hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform.

hero.description: Wide-angle photograph of a premium, modern bicycle showroom interior

parallax_detail.description: Macro photography of a premium bicycle gear cassette

mtb_studio.description: Studio product photography of a premium mountain bike

city_bike_studio.description: Studio product photography of a modern urban city commuter bicycle

rentals_background.description: Couple rides tandem bicycle at sunset

gallery_3.description: Brown bicycle in tilt shift lens

brand_logos_strategy: CRITICAL: Do NOT use placeholder images (like placehold.co or dummyimage.com) for brand logos (Hercules, Hero Cycles, Firefox, Mach City, BSA). Instead, create typographic logos using pure HTML/Tailwind: a span with uppercase, font-bold, tracking-widest, text-muted-foreground. Optionally pair with a Lucide icon (e.g. Activity, Hexagon, Triangle).

icons.usage: Use thick, clean strokes. Essential for Trust Bar (Star, Users, Shield, MapPin) and Contact section.

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.rules: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-xl, pure white text/icons on dark or dark on light. Contains Logo 'Just Ride Cycles', standard links, and prominent 'Enquire' CTA button.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
page_sections.rules: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Absolute positioned showroom_hero image with Ken Burns animation. Overlay bg-black/40. Huge text H1. Dual CTAs: solid Green WhatsApp button, outline Call button.

page_sections.name: Trust Bar
page_sections.rules: Grid of 4 items below hero. White bg. '4.9 Google Rating', '554+ Reviews', '10+ Premium Brands', 'Service Center'. Use Lucide icons.

page_sections.name: Showroom Experience
page_sections.rules: Split screen (md:grid-cols-2). Left column sticky text ('Experience the Ride'). Right column uses parallax_detail image. Padding py-24.

page_sections.name: Scroll Animation Feature
page_sections.rules: Horizontal scroll container for 'Why Choose Us'. Wide selection, expert service, genuine parts.

page_sections.name: Categories Bento Grid
page_sections.rules: Bento layout (1 big, 2 small, etc.). Use mtb_studio, city_bike_studio, kids_bike as backgrounds or isolated product shots. 'Mountain', 'City & Hybrid', 'Kids', 'Accessories'.

page_sections.name: Cycle Showcase
page_sections.rules: Product cards. Image on top, Title, Spec tags (e.g. '21 Speed', 'Alloy Frame'). NO PRICES. Bottom of card: Full width 'Enquire on WhatsApp' CTA button (bg-[#22c55e]).

page_sections.name: Rentals
page_sections.rules: Dark section (bg-[#111111]). rentals_background image overlaid softly on right. Left side large text 'Rent. Ride. Explore.' CTA 'Book Rental on WhatsApp'.

page_sections.name: Buyer's Guide
page_sections.rules: 4-step timeline. Clean typography. Numbered steps with borders.

page_sections.name: Gallery Masonry
page_sections.rules: columns-2 md:columns-3 masonry layout. Break grid rigidity. Use gallery_1, gallery_2, gallery_3, plus other images. Add lightbox if possible.

page_sections.name: Contact & Location
page_sections.rules: Grid layout. Left: Address in Kumbakonam, hours, big WhatsApp/Call CTAs. Right: Google Maps embed iframe.

page_sections.name: Social Strip & Footer
page_sections.rules: Clean footer, muted background, brand name, quick links, copyright.

page_sections.name: Floating Action Buttons
page_sections.rules: Fixed bottom-right corner. WhatsApp icon button and Call button, rounded-full, p-4, shadow-lg, bg-[#22c55e].

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn', data-testid='nav-link-showcase', data-testid='floating-whatsapp').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on accent green meets WCAG. Muted text must be legible against white.
